query: SELECT ptc.stationCode, pc.categoryName, ptc.dailyTargetQty, ptc.baseUnitPoints FROM productivity_target_configs ptc JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = ptc.categoryId WHERE ptc.active = 1 AND pc.brandName = 'Apple' AND pc.categoryName IN ('平板電腦','耳機音響','穿戴型設備','桌上型電腦','智慧型手機','筆記型電腦') GROUP BY ptc.stationCode, pc.categoryName, ptc.dailyTargetQty, ptc.baseUnitPoints ORDER BY FIELD(ptc.stationCode,'A1','A2','B','C','D','E'), FIELD(pc.categoryName,'平板電腦','耳機音響','穿戴型設備','桌上型電腦','智慧型手機','筆記型電腦');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT ptc.stationCode, pc.categoryName, ptc.dailyTargetQty, ptc.baseUnitPoints FROM productivity_target_configs ptc JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = ptc.categoryId WHERE ptc.active = 1 AND pc.brandName = 'Apple' AND pc.categoryName IN ('平板電腦','耳機音響','穿戴型設備','桌上型電腦','智慧型手機','筆記型電腦') GROUP BY ptc.stationCode, pc.categoryName, ptc.dailyTargetQty, ptc.baseUnitPoints ORDER BY FIELD(ptc.stationCode,'A1','A2','B','C','D','E'), FIELD(pc.categoryName,'平板電腦','耳機音響','穿戴型設備','桌上型電腦','智慧型手機','筆記型電腦');
